lastReviewFeedback:
coderabbitai: **Actionable comments posted: 2**
🤖 Prompt for all review comments with AI agents ``` Verify each finding against the current code and only fix it if needed. Inline comments: In `@apps/docs/src/content/docs/component-library/hx-number-input.mdx`: - Around line 118-127: The demo uses "mg" in the prefix slot which is nonstandard; update the ComponentDemo example that renders so that the unit appears in the suffix slot (move the mg to mg) or alternatively replace the prefix with an appropriate symbol (e.g., a currency symbol) to make the prefix/suffix usage consistent with the "Patient Weight" example and standard unit notation. In `@packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-number-input/hx-number-input.ts`: - Around line 563-565: Remove the redundant ARIA attributes from the native number input in the HxNumberInput component: delete the aria-valuenow, aria-valuemin, and aria-valuemax bindings (the lines setting aria-valuenow=${...}, aria-valuemin=${...}, aria-valuemax=${...}) inside the render/template for hx-number-input so the native relies on its built-in value/min/max semantics; keep the existing value, min, and max attributes and do not add a role, as the implicit spinbutton semantics are sufficient. ```
